Beerfest (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,185,184Details
International Box Office $974,132
Worldwide Box Office $20,159,316
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,664,625
Total $29,664,625
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,031,228 (36.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:95.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,500,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,964 opening theaters/2,964 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,031,271

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 25th, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: December 5th, 2006 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for pervasive crude and sexual content, language, nudity and substance abuse
Running Time: 110 minutes
Geographical setting: Germany
Plot point: Death of a Colleague, Death of a Sibling, Death of a Twin, Family Secrets, Relationships Gone Wrong, Twins
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Village Roadshow Productions, Legendary Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
